title: Criminal Law | The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen Serves California
content:
### Defending Freedom, Restoring Home: Your Shield in the Storm
“Together We Go Further”
At The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we take pride in offering our clients exceptional legal service when they are faced with a crime. If you believe you are being charged or accused of a crime, it is your right to have an experienced, trusted attorney by your side. As you take into consideration the complexities of what you are up against, allow our criminal defense attorney to guide and support you. With years of experience serving clients throughout the Los Angeles County area, we are confident we can help you as well.
Criminal defense law is complex, but we aim to make the experience as thorough as possible for you. We make our clients our top priority 24/7, and that means answering the phone, answering your questions, creating a legal strategy you feel good about, and working hard to address each of your needs.
As a full-service law firm, we meet our clients’ needs. Our attorneys speak Vietnamese, Spanish, Mandarin, Cantonese, and Japanese to fully support you. As you take into consideration what you are up against, know that you have a confident attorney ready to support you.
We encourage you to call us immediately if you are facing any type of criminal law charges, including drug offenses, assault and battery, domestic violence, or others. Let us help you navigate this process. Contact us now for a consultation with a criminal defense attorney. We serve clients in Los Angeles County, Orange County, Riverside County, and San Bernardino County.

### Other Practice Areas
"Ashley was absolutely amazing regarding a personal legal situation. I know that without his expert help, I wouldn't have been able to enjoy such a favorable result. He answered all my questions patiently and thoroughly, and was absolutely key in providing the best path for resolution. I know there are many lawyers out there, and sometimes it's overwhelming to find someone you can trust, but Ashley went above and beyond what I had expected. Highly, highly recommend him!"
"Passionate, competent and personable are just three words to best describe Mr. Ashley Daniel. Highly recommend this gentlemen to be your Criminal Defense Attorney, he delivers great results and understands the Criminal Justice System very well. Not to mention his retainer fees are very reasonable, he deals with everything hands on and does not involve other Legal Assistant/Paralegal.
You only deal with the attorney one on one, which is ideal being in a tough situation. Mr. Ashley is very responsive and returns phone calls/OR emails promptly.
Being a former client and current client, I would not go anywhere else to seek legal representation. Thank you for your hard work and commitment in helping your client succeed."
Torrance, Los Angeles, CA
"I'd give him ten stars if I could. Great lawyer and great follow through. Got the job done and was extremely communicative throughout the process. If you want a good attorney you should definitely call Ashley."
East Side Costa Mesa, Costa Mesa, CA
No matter what you are up against, you have a criminal defense attorney in Los Angeles County ready to support you as you take on charges of assault and battery. California law puts in place numerous harsh fines and penalties for convictions. Our goal is to develop the best legal strategy for you, helping you to navigate your rights throughout this legal matter.
If you are being charged with assault or battery, or feel you are being accused of it, make The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen your first call. Let our criminal defense attorney answer your questions and create a clear path forward for you. Set up a consultation with us now to learn more about how we can help you.
In the state of California, drug offenses can be complex and carry significant penalties and fines. Yet, these laws are often misinterpreted or may not be clear. Our legal team at The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen can help you if you have been accused of or charged with any type of drug offense. Allow us to help you gather information about your case, create a legal strategy for moving forward, and help you determine the best course of action possible. We are committed to being there for you throughout this process.
For drug offense criminal defense services in Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, or San Bernardino County, call The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen now.

### Theft & Property Crimes
When a person is charged with theft or property crimes, they may feel as though they are guilty in the public’s eye, even if that is not the case. At The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we work hard to ensure you have the legal representation you need to ensure you have qualified legal representation. Our team can answer your questions related to theft and property crimes right away – we are here for our clients 24/7 with exceptional legal support.
When you contact our criminal defense attorney, you gain insight into all of the legal options you have. We will fight to protect your rights and work closely with you to address any legal matter you are facing. Contact us now to schedule a consultation with a criminal defense attorney in LA County.
In the heat of the moment, mistakes happen. Sometimes that mistake is accusing another person of domestic violence. If that is what occurred in your case, or you believe that the charges you are facing are unfair in any way, allow our attorneys at The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen to help you. We work with men and women facing a wide range of legal complications from domestic violence charges, and we work to help our clients secure the best possible outcome.
Our criminal defense attorneys are multi-lingual. We are also available to work with our clients right away. Contact us for 24/7 support so you can overcome your charges and move on with your future.
DUI or DWI charges in California typically can result in hefty fines, penalties against your license, and even the loss of your license in some situations. In others, you could face jail time. Because of how serious these charges are, the criminal defense attorneys at The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen highly recommend that you work closely with a well-qualified attorney who can help you with exceptional legal representation.
Let us work to protect your rights. Set up a consultation with our criminal defense attorney to discuss your DUI and DWI case with us now. You deserve the comprehensive legal support that we can offer.
Charges of sex crimes can carry long-term outcomes, including fines, jail time, and long-term labeling that makes it hard for you to move on with your life. At The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we work closely with our clients to ensure they have the legal representation they need in all types of sex crime charges.
When you reach out to us, our team goes to work to gather evidence and support your claims. We will represent you in a court of law so you are never without yourself. Most importantly, we work aggressively to defend you in a court of law. Contact our sex crimes criminal defense attorney now to get the legal guidance you need. We are here for you.

### Defending Freedom, Restoring Home: Your Shield in the Storm
Schedule a consultation with The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen to address your criminal law matters. Our professional team is dedicated to providing personalized and effective legal solutions. Contact us today to discuss your case and receive the guidance and support you need.
